name: sendletter

offers.description: Starts at $4.29 CAD for a standard tri-fold letter.

description: Send a real letter in the mail from your computer or phone. No account needed. REST API accessible for automated workflows. We print and mail within 1 business day via Canada Post.
featureList: REST API for programmatic letter sending
Three API modes: draft, formatted, upload
Canada Post delivery anywhere in Canada
